name: Creamy Dijon Topped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed, beat the cream cheese until softened.
2. Add the Dijon mustard and dried basil to the bowl. Beat until smooth.
3. Stir in the finely chopped black olives, scallions, and red pepper.
4. To serve, use a piping bag or spoon to place about one tablespoon of the mixture onto each potato half.
5. Garnish with scallion tips and serve.
Makes 3 dozen appetizers
Source: Reader's Digest, April 1993
